title: vibin' dining diner
description: A calm mod pack to spice up vanilla with more decorations and a little technology.
body:
# Time to Dine
A modpack to spice up your vanilla Minecraft. Has decorative and furniture mods to build your perfect world. Even some technology for those challenging tasks. Add some quality of life changes and you get the perfect meal. 

### Can be played single player or together with multiplayer. The choice is up to you.
